description: Plugin-distributed hooks for wealth-management-advisory. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags wealth-management-advisory anti-patterns (guarantee/return language, plaintext client PII, recommendation without suitability note, performance claim without disclosure). Set WEALTH_ADVISORY_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
